Game Controller Module¶

Main game controller module.

This is the central orchestrator of the game lifecycle.

Responsible for: - Initializing pygame and game window - Managing the main game loop - Handling user input events - Creating and storing entities - Loading and transforming maps - Coordinating rendering and game systems

class controller.game_controller.GameController[source]¶

Bases: object

Core controller of the entire game.

Acts as the central coordinator between:

  • Input system

  • Entity system

  • Map system

  • Rendering system

Holds global game state and runs the main loop.

create_entity(e_name: str, **kwargs)[source]¶

Create new entities.

Parameters:

  • e_name (str) – Type of entity to create (e.g. ‘player’, ‘npc’)

  • **kwargs – Arguments passed to entity constructor

Returns:

Created entity instance

Return type:

Entity

Raises:

ValueError – If entity type is unknown

run()[source]¶

Run the main game loop.

Handles:

  • Frame timing

  • Input processing

  • Rendering

select_map()[source]¶

Load and select the current level map.

Converts JSON map data into Map object and transforms tile data into game entities (walls, floors, NPCs, player).

RPG Game
